_meta.description: Last Epoch unique item reference data for The Forge build planner.
_meta.note: Auto-generated from exports_json/uniques.json. Affix ranges reflect raw game values. PlayerProperty/AbilityProperty affixes show internal engine names — see unique_effects for the human-readable description.

calamity.name: Calamity
unique_effects: 100–150% Chance to Ignite on Hit with Fire Skills
When you kill an enemy with a fire skill you take 4 fire damage over the next 2 seconds
calamity.lore: Set the world ablaze and burn along with it.

fractured_crown.name: Fractured Crown
unique_effects: You have no ward
fractured_crown.lore: Few goals have cost more lives than the quest for power.

snowblind.name: Snowblind
affixes: +16–24% more Lightning Cold Poison Elemental Spell Player Property
+16–24% more Physical Lightning Cold Poison Elemental Spell Player Property
unique_effects: 40% chance to chill on hit with cold skills
40% chance to blind on hit with cold skills
You are immune to Blind and Chill
snowblind.lore: Blind with the snow, never blinded by it.

artors_legacy.name: Artor's Legacy
artors_legacy.implicit: +84 Armour; +32–44% Cold Resistance; +104–208% Freeze Rate Multiplier
artors_legacy.lore: The great wolf Artor ran with Heorot in times long forgotten.

decayed_skull.name: Decayed Skull
affixes: +15–30% Armour Mitigation Applies To Damage Over Time
unique_effects: 80% increased void and necrotic damage
20% of void and necrotic damage taken as physical damage
3–10% More Armor (multiplicative with other modifiers)
decayed_skull.lore: A monument to the world's decay carved in bone and steel.

boneclamor_barbute.name: Boneclamor Barbute
boneclamor_barbute.lore: "The essence of the bone seemed to reverberate within my skull. Singing and dancing into a song of fortifying vigor. Never have I felt so alive." - Ethenus, First Legate of the Immortal Legion.

the_kestrel.name: The Kestrel
affixes: +15–30% increased Effect Of Ailment On You
the_kestrel.lore: May the dying breaths of your enemies put air beneath your wings.

doublet_of_onos_tull.name: Doublet of Onos Tull
unique_effects: Minions have +60–100% Chance to Inflict Bleed on Hit
Minions have 60–100% Increased Bleed Duration
doublet_of_onos_tull.lore: The horns of the Immortal Empire fill the hearts of the living with fear, and the bones of the dead with glory.

prism_wraps.name: Prism Wraps
prism_wraps.lore: The elements shift like light through a prism. If you control the prism you control the elements.

urzils_pride.name: Urzil's Pride
unique_effects: 1% increased mana regeneration per 2% uncapped Lightning Resistance
urzils_pride.lore: Strength of mind and strength of body are a potent combination.

exsanguinous.name: Exsanguinous
unique_effects: 15–30% increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed if you have used a potion in the past 4 seconds
Immunity to Bleed at low health
exsanguinous.lore: Crazed is the mind of a blood starved Lich.

yruns_wisdom.name: Yrun's Wisdom
unique_effects: +30 melee cold damage when above 65% health
3% of melee damage leeched as health when below 65% health
yruns_wisdom.lore: Yrun was wise in battle, but not in his betrayal of Heorot.

titan_heart.name: Titan Heart
unique_effects: You do not regenerate health
titan_heart.lore: Heart of stone, blood of gravel.

valeroot.name: Valeroot
affixes: +100–200% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
valeroot.lore: The roots of Eterra grow through stone and flesh and time.

vipertail.name: Vipertail
affixes: +7% Physical Cold Fire Void Necrotic Ability Property
vipertail.lore: The bite of the viper brings lethargy and death.

ward_trail.name: Ward Trail
affixes: +30–50 Physical Lightning Cold Fire Elemental Player Property
ward_trail.lore: Many things are fickle, few more so than life itself.

chains_of_uleros.name: Chains of Uleros
unique_effects: 24% reduced duration of stuns on you
Your potions grant ward instead of health
chains_of_uleros.lore: Tether yourself to this mortal realm.

mourningfrost.name: Mourningfrost
unique_effects: +1 cold damage to attacks and spells per point of dexterity
-1% physical and cold resistance per point of dexterity
mourningfrost.lore: Spread ice with every step, like frost before sunrise.

stormtide.name: Stormtide
unique_effects: You are shocked for 4 seconds when you stop moving
stormtide.lore: Rest was a sin among the messenger priests of Lagon, and these boots would punish the wearer accordingly.

eterras_path.name: Eterra's Path
affixes: +100% Physical Lightning Cold Poison Level Of Skills
unique_effects: You and your minions have 20% increased movement speed
You and your minions have 20–28% increased healing effectiveness
Every second if you are moving you have a 20–28% chance to cast Summon Vines

keepers_gloves.name: Keeper's Gloves
unique_effects: 10% chance to summon a swarm of bees on melee hit (8 second cooldown)

riverbend_grasp.name: Riverbend Grasp
affixes: +18–30% Cold Fire Void Elemental Player Property
riverbend_grasp.lore: Move with the fluidity of water, relax and you can react without resistance.

boulderfists.name: Boulderfists
unique_effects: You cannot leech health
boulderfists.lore: Strike with the force of a mountain.

wing_guards.name: Wing Guards
unique_effects: You cannot deal critical strikes

beast_king.name: Beast King
beast_king.implicit: +36 Melee Damage; +36–66% Melee Ailment Chance; +10–16% Increased Ailment Duration
unique_effects: 8% less damage taken if your minions have killed recently
minions take 25% less damage if you have killed recently
beast_king.lore: The King of Beasts leads the charge.

taste_of_blood.name: Taste of Blood
unique_effects: When you hit a bleeding enemy with a melee attack all bleed stacks on that enemy double in speed
taste_of_blood.lore: A bloody fervor clouds the mind.

undisputed.name: Undisputed
undisputed.implicit: +51 Melee Damage; +10–14 Melee Minion Damage; +70–100% Ailment Chance
unique_effects: 5% increased physical damage for each recent melee hit against a bleeding enemy (up to 255%)

tempest_maw.name: Tempest Maw
tempest_maw.implicit: +28 Melee Damage; +14–28 Lightning Melee Damage; +7–14% Lightning Penetration
unique_effects: +3–6 Strength and Attunement
When you summon a totem you also summon 4 Storm Sprites around the totem (6 second cooldown)
tempest_maw.lore: A last sign of favour bestowed to those doomed to fight for Lagon's amusement in his sunken arena.

frozen_ire.name: Frozen Ire
frozen_ire.implicit: +43 Cold Melee Damage; +43 Cold Spell Damage; +43–143% Freeze Rate Multiplier
unique_effects: +1 spell cold damage per 5 character levels ([1,c,5])
+2% freeze rate multiplier per character level ([2,c]%)
+1% necrotic resistance per character level ([1,c])
15% chance to cast tundra nova on hit with cold skills (chance doubled against undead)
frozen_ire.lore: An alliance of wengari and nomads gathered in the northern tundra, forging weapons of ice and preparing to reclaim Heoborea from the Immortal Empire.

culnivars_claim.name: Culnivar's Claim
unique_effects: 100% of mana converted to ward when you reach full mana
culnivars_claim.lore: Culnivar, last scion of Liath, was a symbol of hope for the living slaves of Thetima.

humming_bee.name: Humming Bee
affixes: +1% Physical Fire Necrotic Poison Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: Elemental Attacks deal 1% Increased Damage per 200 Ward

eye_of_reen.name: Eye of Reen
affixes: +75–100% Physical Cold Void Necrotic Poison Player Property
unique_effects: Each stack of Reen's Ire grants 5% melee critical strike multiplier and 10% increased fire damage over time

rainbow_edge.name: Rainbow Edge
unique_effects: +25–75% chance to Shock Ignite and Chill on Hit

cinder_song.name: Cinder Song
unique_effects: 15–25% chance to inflict Spreading Flames on Hit
-3 Mana Cost for Fire Spells

alchemists_ladle.name: Alchemist's Ladle
unique_effects: 20–45% chance to ignite, chill, shock, bleed, slow, poison, and blind on melee hit
alchemists_ladle.lore: Infused with countless potions, its effects are unpredictable.

reach_of_the_grave.name: Reach of the Grave
unique_effects: Your minions' spells and bow attacks deal 70–120% increased damage
Your minions leech 10% of damage dealt by their spells and bow attacks as health
reach_of_the_grave.lore: The touch of death reaches far beyond the grave.

bone_harvester.name: Bone Harvester
unique_effects: 20% chance to summon a Skeleton Harvester for 15 seconds on kill
bone_harvester.lore: Some kill without a purpose. Acolytes kill for the harvest.

hammer_of_lorent.name: Hammer of Lorent
unique_effects: +1 melee physical damage per level ([1,c])
1% increased melee stun chance per level ([1,c]%)
hammer_of_lorent.lore: Lorent may be gone, but its memory will remain with you as you grow.

torch_of_the_pontifex.name: Torch Of The Pontifex
torch_of_the_pontifex.implicit: +38 Melee Damage; +20–60% Melee Increased Stun Chance
unique_effects: You cremate enemies you kill, burning enemies around them
You have a 10% chance to summon a Burning Skeleton for 10 seconds when you cremate an enemy
torch_of_the_pontifex.lore: Pontifex Yulia, High Priest of the Immortal Empire, would sacrifice entire villages and raise burning soldiers from the ashes.

storm_breaker.name: Storm Breaker
unique_effects: Gain a Storm Stack when you directly use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy
storm_breaker.lore: Strike with the power of the storm.

draalsting.name: Draalsting
draalsting.lore: Poison the mind, kill the heart.

morditas_reach.name: Morditas' Reach
unique_effects: +500% chance to inflict Frostbite on Melee Hit
+20–30 Melee Cold Damage for you and your minions

sharktooth_saw.name: Sharktooth Saw
unique_effects: 35% increased damage to bleeding targets
5% chance to cause you to bleed when you hit with your weapon

the_last_laugh.name: The Last Laugh
unique_effects: Instantly kill enemies that are left below 15–20% Health by a Melee Attack
+5% melee critical strike chance if you have less than 100 dodge rating
the_last_laugh.lore: When the headsman's blade falls, Sarno laughs in triumph.

volcanus.name: Volcanus
unique_effects: 15% chance to cast Magma Shards on melee hit
volcanus.lore: Crafted in the Divine Era in the great forges beneath the mountains of Rahyeh.

dreamthorn.name: Dreamthorn
dreamthorn.lore: Eater of dreams, weaver of nightmares.

the_slab.name: The Slab
unique_effects: 100% less damage taken on block
Your Block Chance cannot exceed 75%
the_slab.lore: Some slabs mark the dead, this one marks the living.

close_call.name: Close Call
affixes: +400% Lightning Cold Void Necrotic Poison Player Property
unique_effects: 40% increased dodge rating for each hit you have blocked recently
close_call.lore: Light on your feet, with a foot in the grave.

soul_bastion.name: Soul Bastion
affixes: +200% Physical Cold Spell Level Of Skills
unique_effects: Gains a Soul Charge on kill
At 5 soul charges, casts Soul Eruption
soul_bastion.lore: The weight of souls is too much for most.

rahyehs_light.name: Rahyeh's Light
affixes: +100% Physical Cold Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
rahyehs_light.lore: Burn with the fire of the eternal sun.

strong_mind.name: Strong Mind
unique_effects: 200% of maximum mana added as stun avoidance
Cast a small lightning explosion when you are stunned

bleeding_heart.name: Bleeding Heart
bleeding_heart.implicit: +5–15% increased Melee Attack Speed; +5–15% increased Throwing Attack Speed
unique_effects: You are inflicted with bleed when you cast a spell
bleeding_heart.lore: Drink the blood of the weak.

chimaeras_essence.name: Chimaera's Essence
chimaeras_essence.implicit: +5–15% increased Melee Attack Speed; +5–15% increased Throwing Attack Speed

the_claw.name: The Claw
unique_effects: You can Summon Wolves up to your Maximum Number of Companions
+5–9 Melee Physical Damage for Minions

death_rattle.name: Death Rattle
death_rattle.implicit: +5–35% increased Minion Damage; +5–35% increased Minion Critical Chance
affixes: +100–300% Cold Fire Elemental Level Of Skills
unique_effects: Your minions take 10–30% increased damage
Regain 30 health on minion death
death_rattle.lore: The rattle of the dying is the sound of weakness leaving the world.

the_fang.name: The Fang
unique_effects: You can Summon Wolves up to your Maximum Number of Companions
+10–16 Melee Physical Damage for Minions
Your minions cannot be stunned

orians_eye.name: Orian's Eye
unique_effects: 75–150% increased duration of stun immunity after being stunned
orians_eye.lore: The future burns within the prophetic lense.

ring_of_the_third_eye.name: Ring of the Third Eye
unique_effects: 30% Chance to gain 15–18 Ward on Crit (up to 4 times per second)
ring_of_the_third_eye.lore: Forsee the strikes, imbue them with power.

arboreal_circuit.name: Arboreal Circuit
unique_effects: 10% chance to summon an illusory tree when hit (15 second cooldown)
5–10% increased Movement Speed for you and your minions
arboreal_circuit.lore: You can search round and round, but you are seeking an illusion.

hollow_finger.name: Hollow Finger
hollow_finger.implicit: +5–35% increased Minion Damage; +0.05–0.35 increased Minion Health; +5–35% Minion Critical Multiplier
unique_effects: +1 Maximum Skeleton

tome_of_elements.name: Tome of Elements
unique_effects: +15–45% chance to chill, shock, and ignite on hit with elemental skills
10–15% increased chill, shock, and ignite duration
tome_of_elements.lore: The power of the elements is greatest in their most primal state.

grimoire_of_necrotic_elixirs.name: Grimoire of Necrotic Elixirs
unique_effects: 30–40% less void, necrotic, and poison damage taken for 4 seconds on potion use
+30–40 necrotic damage to melee attacks and spells for 4 seconds on potion use
grimoire_of_necrotic_elixirs.lore: Take a quaff from draught of undeath.

heirloom_of_light.name: Heirloom of Light
unique_effects: When you cast a spell while facing East you have a 20% chance to cast radiant nova
You have 1% increased spell damage per level if you have cast radiant nova recently
heirloom_of_light.lore: Wherever you go, the sun still rises in Solarum. Wherever you may be, Rahyeh is your judge.

soulfire.name: Soulfire
affixes: +100% Physical Fire Void Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: +100–160% Chance to Ignite on Hit with Fire Skills and Necrotic Skills
60% increased fire damage if you have killed an enemy recently
100% increased armor while ignited
Hungering Souls Ignite on Hit instead of Possessing
soulfire.lore: The souls of the damned burn with eternal fire.

valdyrs_chalice.name: Valdyr's Chalice
valdyrs_chalice.lore: The blood within is said to reflect the drinker's true face.

orchirians_petals.name: Orchirian's Petals
unique_effects: 13% Increased Cast Speed with Physical Spells
21% Increased Critical Strike Chance with Physical Spells
34% Increased Stun Chance with Physical Spells
orchirians_petals.lore: Petals harvested from the remains of Orchirian the Rampant, still bright with the light of an ancient sun.

plague_bearers_staff.name: Plague Bearer's Staff
plague_bearers_staff.implicit: +53 Melee Damage; +39–47 Spell Damage; +39–93% increased DoT Damage
unique_effects: 100% Chance To Inflict Plague on Hit
20% Chance To Blind Attackers
10–20% More Damage Over Time against Enemies afflicted with Plague
plague_bearers_staff.lore: The Plague Bearer wandered far and wide searching for a cure for his affliction and left only death in his wake.

ignivars_head.name: Ignivar's Head
unique_effects: Cast Fire Aura every second while Channelling
Disintegrate deals more damage equal to your spell crit chance
ignivars_head.lore: Dying cinders illuminate the empty skull.

the_scavenger.name: The Scavenger
unique_effects: Gain Haste for 3 Seconds on Potion Use
the_scavenger.lore: Gods may fall and empires crumble, but the furtive scavenger lives on.

liaths_signet.name: Liath's Signet
affixes: +15–30% Channelling Chance To Gain30Ward When Hit
liaths_signet.lore: For centuries Architect Liath ensured the prosperity of Lagon's realm.

ucenuis_sphere.name: Ucenui's Sphere
ucenuis_sphere.implicit: +20–40% increased Cold Damage; +20–40% increased Lightning Damage
unique_effects: +20–40% Cold and Lightning Resistance
3 Water Orbs per cast if your Attunement is Equal to your Intelligence
20% increased Cold and Lightning Damage for each Water Orb you have cast in the past 12 seconds
ucenuis_sphere.lore: Ucenui the navigator used his water magic to explore the vast ocean beyond the Isle of Storms. His fate is unknown, but his instrument remains.

areks_bones.name: Arek's Bones
affixes: +100% Lightning Cold Fire Void Player Property
unique_effects: +60–90% Chance to apply Armour Shred on Hit for You and Your Minions
100–200% Increased Armour Shred Effect for You and Your Minions
areks_bones.lore: The necromancers were careful to keep Arek's mind intact while they extracted the bones from his flesh.

maehlins_hubris.name: Maehlin's Hubris
maehlins_hubris.lore: Maehlin devoted his life to Rahyeh. Seeking to learn his will he reached into the god's mind. Rahyeh reached back into his and set his blood aflame.

heirloom_of_the_last_nomad.name: Heirloom of the Last Nomad
unique_effects: Using a Potion Cleanses Stun and Freeze
heirloom_of_the_last_nomad.lore: The last nomad wandered the northern wastes in the dying days of the Ruined Era, searching in vain for a living soul among the void and snow.

fiery_dragon_shoes.name: Fiery Dragon Shoes
affixes: +75–85% Reduced Bonus Damage Taken From Crits
fiery_dragon_shoes.lore: Embers of a dragon's heart still linger in these smoldering scales. Dire hits threaten to stoke a wrath that has long slumbered.

jungle_queens_chaps_of_holding.name: Jungle Queen's Chaps of Holding
affixes: +10% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Necrotic Poison Elemental Player Property
jungle_queens_chaps_of_holding.lore: The lack of a bottom means that there is more material for pockets.

kermodes_cage.name: Kermode's Cage
affixes: +200% Physical Lightning Cold Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
+15–30 Physical Lightning Cold Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: White Fur in Werebear Form
kermodes_cage.lore: The fury of the spirit bear can not be restrained or subdued, even while confined.

legacy_of_the_quiet_forest.name: Legacy of the Quiet Forest
affixes: +15–20 Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
legacy_of_the_quiet_forest.lore: “This branch will protect you, even when I can not.” - the last words Quiet heard from her forest friend.

sulorons_step.name: Suloron's Step
sulorons_step.lore: The rebel Suloron struck deep into Majasa's territory, but his fervour could not save him from the matrons' blades.

the_ashen_crown.name: The Ashen Crown
unique_effects: Elemental Nova is now cast at the target location
the_ashen_crown.lore: The great crown of the regent of Wyvernfall, bestowed by Rahyeh, recovered from the ruins.

shroud_of_obscurity.name: Shroud of Obscurity
affixes: +300–1300% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Elemental Player Property
shroud_of_obscurity.lore: Shrouded in a fetid swamp, disregarded by the gods' watchful eyes, the witches of Urix honed the art of blood magic.

muramas_hilt.name: Murama's Hilt
affixes: +400–600% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Ability Property
muramas_hilt.lore: Xenath broke his father's sword, casting away the cursed blade in resentment of his harsh master, and keeping the hilt as a reminder of his loving parent.

melverns_writ.name: Melvern's Writ
affixes: +100% Physical Lightning Fire Poison Player Property
melverns_writ.lore: "If Liath will not afford me guards I will purchase my own. Deliver this writ to Skalnir, along with the gold, and bring me back enough mercenaries to secure caravans to Vul'Kaur." - Trade Prince Melvern

woven_flesh.name: Woven Flesh
woven_flesh.lore: The pinnacle of necromancy is to weave undead flesh into any form you desire.

strands_of_souls.name: Strands of Souls
strands_of_souls.lore: It is unseemly to wear the heads of your foes upon your belt like a common witch or wengari, and what is the point if the eyes can no longer see and the brains can no longer think. No, a necromancer should wear the souls of those they have conquered, a repository of sentient energy ready to consume.

ribbons_of_blood.name: Ribbons of Blood
unique_effects: +4–7 Melee Physical Damage for Minions
Your Minions cannot be Crit
ribbons_of_blood.lore: The congealing liquid grips tight around your finger, the memories of its vessels passing into those that you summon.

frozen_eyes_of_formosus.name: Frozen Eyes of Formosus
affixes: +50–80% More Freeze Rate Per Stack Of Chill
+150–300% Minion More Freeze Rate Per Stack Of Chill
unique_effects: 80–140% increased Minion Cold Damage
frozen_eyes_of_formosus.lore: The eyes still stare out, transfixed with longing for the power their owner sought.

last_steps_of_the_living.name: Last Steps of the Living
last_steps_of_the_living.implicit: +8 Armour; +15–18% increased Movespeed; +120–230 Ward Decay Threshold
unique_effects: You are Chilled every 3 seconds
last_steps_of_the_living.lore: Step out of the cold, out of the mortal realm, and take your place among the empire.

atrophy.name: Atrophy
unique_effects: +20–25% Penetration against All Resistances for Damage Over Time
atrophy.lore: Rust and corrosion stand as monuments to the inevitability of time.

dark_shroud_of_cinders.name: Dark Shroud of Cinders
dark_shroud_of_cinders.lore: The dying embers of a god swiling around a blackened cloak.

the_confluence_of_fate.name: The Confluence of Fate
the_confluence_of_fate.lore: The fall of Eterra is inevitable, as it always has been.

bulwark_of_the_last_abyss.name: Bulwark of the Last Abyss
unique_effects: Every 3 seconds if you are on high health you lose 25% of your current health and gain the Apocalypse buff for 3 seconds
70% increased Void Damage during Apocalypse
+70% Melee Critical Strike Multiplier during Apocalypse
bulwark_of_the_last_abyss.lore: Hold steadfast at the edge of light.

trident_of_the_last_abyss.name: Trident of the Last Abyss
trident_of_the_last_abyss.lore: The dark ocean of void lies still. Echoes are all that remain of the strife that preceeded it.

coral_aegis.name: Coral Aegis
coral_aegis.implicit: +23% Block Chance; +325–425 Block Effectiveness; +45–75% increased Physical Melee Damage
affixes: +1% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Spell Player Property
coral_aegis.lore: As storms scour the land, the sea swells and flourishes.

symbol_of_demise.name: Symbol of Demise
unique_effects: Every 3 seconds your ward is consumed, granting a stack of Demise per 13 ward consumed
Each stack of Demise grants 10% Bleed Chance (up to 200%)
Each stack of Demise grants 1% increased Bleed Duration
symbol_of_demise.lore: The fate of the world engraved in bone.

dragonflame_edict.name: Dragonflame Edict
dragonflame_edict.implicit: +95 Melee Damage; +85–95 Spell Damage; +100% Elemental Level Of Skills
affixes: +60% Physical Lightning Void Poison Player Property
dragonflame_edict.lore: Go forth and conquer by force or by fire.

oceareon.name: Oceareon
affixes: -4–-2% more Lightning Fire Void Necrotic Poison Elemental Player Property
+1% more Damage Per Stack Of Ailment
oceareon.lore: Empires rise and fall like the waves, but the ocean's might is eternal.

mortalitys_grasp.name: Mortality's Grasp
unique_effects: 30–45% chance to Mark for Death on Hit with Necrotic Spells
mortalitys_grasp.lore: "The living necromancers of the early empire were quick to take life and to return it. They knew more of the nature of life than any who had come before them, so it is curious that they clung to their own with such desperation. Were these founders of our empire fools and cowards, or did they know something then that we have now forgotten? I wonder if there is something that we have lost in these centuries of undeath." - Recanted texts of Historian Zabat

gamblers_fallacy.name: Gambler's Fallacy
affixes: +50% Physical Fire Void Poison Player Property
unique_effects: Your Skills gain +100% Critical Strike Chance if you have not dealt a Critical Strike Recently. Excludes Channeled Skills.
gamblers_fallacy.lore: Just means you're due for a big one, don't worry.

avarice.name: Avarice
avarice.lore: Have the wisdom to know what is rightfully yours and the will to seize it.

transient_rest.name: Transient Rest
affixes: +40–60% Lightning Fire Void Poison Player Property
transient_rest.lore: We follow in the footsteps of our ancestors, but our paths no longer end.

xitharas_conundrum.name: Xithara's Conundrum
unique_effects: You have no health regen
You have no health leech
xitharas_conundrum.lore: Strong in times of peace, brilliant in the day, generous in times of plenty, and absent when they fade.

lirakas_claws.name: Li'raka's Claws
affixes: +200% Physical Lightning Cold Spell Ability Property
lirakas_claws.lore: Scalebane recruits are taught to never travel south of Mes'Ork in groups of less than six. Information on Li'raka's whereabouts are valuable, so it is pertinent that one should escape alive.

quicksilver_coil.name: Quicksilver Coil
quicksilver_coil.lore: War is about the destination, not the journey.

smoke_weaver.name: Smoke Weaver
affixes: +20–25% Cold Void Poison Spell Ability Property
+20–25% Cold Void Poison Spell Ability Property
smoke_weaver.lore: A true assassin must create their own shadows to strike from.

uethrins_stand.name: Uethrin's Stand
affixes: +200% Physical Lightning Fire Void Necrotic Poison Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: +15–25 Bow Physical Damage for Minions
uethrins_stand.lore: Uethrin made his last stand on the shores of Lake Mawn. By dawn all that remained was a pile of Wengari bodies and his line of ballistae standing still and victorious upon the shore. His home was safe for another winter.

hell_reach.name: Hell Reach
hell_reach.lore: As Wyvernfall burned nothing could escape the flames.

drelkors_compass.name: Drelkor's Compass
affixes: +400% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Poison Spell Ability Property
drelkors_compass.lore: "Enemies lie to the north, south, east, and west, but it matters not whence they come; Welryn must not fall." Drelkor, last Lord of the Lakes.

gladiators_oath.name: Gladiator's Oath
affixes: +20–40% Lightning Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
+100% Lightning Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
+20–45% Physical Lightning Cold Void Necrotic Poison Player Property
unique_effects: Dancing Strikes' 3rd Strike Creates a Fighting Arena
gladiators_oath.lore: There is no mercy among the sands of the arena. Majasa demands beauty, be it the glory of victory or the dance of blood.

acidfletch.name: Acidfletch
acidfletch.implicit: +42 Bow Damage; +35–70% Bow Ailment Chance; +10–20% Increased Ailment Duration
affixes: +100% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
+30–60% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
acidfletch.lore: From the Radiant Dunes to the Sea of Glass, order corrodes throughout Eterra.

lifes_journey.name: Life's Journey
lifes_journey.implicit: +19% Block Chance; +215–275 Block Effectiveness; +25–60% increased Physical Damage
lifes_journey.lore: Hold fast to the wheel of life, cling tight as it withers your skin and grinds your flesh to dust.

troakas_teeth.name: Troaka's Teeth
affixes: +100% Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: +90 Freeze Rate with Puncture
troakas_teeth.lore: Many among the nomads had assumed Troaka slain along with her family, but in truth she still hunted out on the tundra and among the frozen lakes. Except she no longer hunted deer nor eber, only wengari.

raindance.name: Raindance
raindance.implicit: +8 Armour; +11–14% increased Movespeed; +16–32% Lightning Cold Fire Spell Melee Ability Property
affixes: +205–305 Physical Lightning Cold Necrotic Poison Player Property
+13–20 Lightning Cold Void Necrotic Poison Player Property
raindance.lore: Those who seek Lagon's favour dance beneath the moon. Those who seek his adoration dance beneath the waves.

arrowguard.name: Arrowguard
arrowguard.implicit: +15–30% increased Bow Damage; +15–30% Bow Increased Stun Chance
arrowguard.lore: "Look only west and trust that the sun itself leads our march. " - Pontixex Aurelus to the auxiliaries of Solarum

omnividence.name: Omnividence
omnividence.implicit: +70 Melee Damage; +63–80 Spell Damage; -300–-500% Spell Mana Cost
omnividence.lore: Gaze upon all that will never be.

sunwreath.name: Sunwreath
affixes: +400–1000% Cold Fire Void Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: Flame Reave hits enemies in an expanding circle around you
sunwreath.lore: Yield not snow, nor seas, nor sand to the flames of the sun, for it will consume all and remain unsated.

eulogy_of_blood.name: Eulogy of Blood
eulogy_of_blood.implicit: +46 Necrotic Melee Damage; +100–166% increased Necrotic Melee Damage; +100–166% increased Necrotic Minion Damage
eulogy_of_blood.lore: Only the whispers of ghosts can be heard among the stillness of the crimson tundra.

anchor_of_oblivion.name: Anchor of Oblivion
unique_effects: When a hit leaves you below your endurance threshold you are slowed and release a powerful Wave of Void (2 second cooldown)
anchor_of_oblivion.lore: Hope pulls you forward, but the anchor ever stays your feet, as is the fate of mortals.

wings_of_argentus.name: Wings of Argentus
wings_of_argentus.lore: Falter not before the fire nor the ice, but let your ambition be your wings and soar above them both.

eye_of_storms.name: Eye of Storms
affixes: +6–15% Lightning Cold Fire Void Necrotic Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: Cast Maelstrom every 3 seconds
eye_of_storms.lore: Torrential rain falls upon a dark and churning sea to the deafening sound of thunder and waves. The moon gleams from above and Lagon gazes from below as the centuries pass.

horns_of_uhkeiros.name: Horns of Uhkeiros
horns_of_uhkeiros.lore: Uhkeriros, Emperor of Corpses, hear our prayers! Devour your chosen and free us from this undeath.

reign_of_winter.name: Reign of Winter
reign_of_winter.lore: “For us to survive, others must suffer. One day you will accept this truth.” -Morditas, forsaken son of Heorot.

call_of_the_tundra.name: Call of the Tundra
affixes: +100–400% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Poison Elemental Spell Level Of Skills
unique_effects: Warcry is Converted to Cold
Warcry no longer knocks enemies back
call_of_the_tundra.lore: Jormun slew the great wyverns of Farwood at Heorot's behest, freezing them with his shouts and shattering them with his blades.

faith_of_the_frozen.name: Faith of the Frozen
faith_of_the_frozen.implicit: +17% Block Chance; +400–460 Block Effectiveness; +75–150% Freeze Rate Multiplier
faith_of_the_frozen.lore: Found among the frozen corpses in the wake of Morditas' wrath. Runes etched into the handle read "Heorot protect us".

bhuldars_wrath.name: Bhuldar's Wrath
affixes: +100% Physical Lightning Void Poison Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: Earthquake is Converted To Fire
100% of Armour Shred Chance Converted to Ignite Chance for Earthquake
bhuldars_wrath.lore: Shatter! Erupt! This world is only a prison for the immortal flame.

herkirs_vessel.name: Herkir's Vessel
herkirs_vessel.lore: Drink deep of the flame, brothers... Immortality awaits.

logis_hunger.name: Logi's Hunger
logis_hunger.lore: Rise! Through fire we are reborn.

serpents_milk.name: Serpent's Milk
serpents_milk.implicit: +5–15% increased Melee Attack Speed; +5–15% increased Throwing Attack Speed
unique_effects: Minions deal 90% less Poison Damage

moenia_mentis.name: Moenia Mentis
affixes: +10–15% Physical Lightning Cold Elemental Player Property
moenia_mentis.lore: "To survive the void we must build unassailable walls, not just around this town, but around our minds. Do not approach the cultists, do not speak to them." - Eos Falrein, last Archmage of Vul'Kaur.

ravens_rise.name: Ravens' Rise
unique_effects: Minions take 20–28% less Damage While Moving
ravens_rise.lore: As men and gods fight the ravens rise. As the blood settles the ravens alight.

flight_of_the_first.name: Flight of the First
flight_of_the_first.implicit: +48 Bow Damage; +3–4% Bow Critical Chance; +31–61% Bow Critical Multiplier
unique_effects: Moving after Attacking grants you Ancient Flight for 2 seconds
+2 Arrows with Flurry and Multishot while you have Ancient Flight
100% increased Critical Strike Chance while you have Ancient Flight
+100% Critical Strike Avoidance while you have Ancient Flight
flight_of_the_first.lore: Those who ventured outside in the Ancient Era lived in constant terror

aergons_refuge.name: Aergon's Refuge
aergons_refuge.implicit: +90–100 Spell Damage; +20–30% increased Mana Regen; -300–-500% Spell Mana Cost
affixes: +100–200% Void Poison Spell Level Of Skills
-10% more Physical Lightning Spell Player Property
aergons_refuge.lore: "Hold fast, maintain the runes! The flames of Rahyeh may envelope this tower, but they shall not penetrate these walls. There is knowledge here that must not burn."

herald_of_the_scurry.name: Herald of the Scurry
unique_effects: Converts your Wolves into Squirrels
Howl is replaced by Sciurine Rage, which grants Squirrels 40% increased movement speed and melee attack speed for 4 seconds.
You can Summon Squirrels up to twice your Companion Limit
herald_of_the_scurry.lore:
One squirrel, two squirrel, cute and furry
Three squirrel, four squirrel, what's the hurry?
Five squirrel, six squirrel, you should worry
Run and hide, here comes the scurry!

omnis.name: Omnis
omnis.lore: All the stars in the empty sky flicker at once and fade into silence and shadow.

auroras_time_glass.name: Aurora's Time Glass
unique_effects: 6–18% increased Attack and Cast Speed

If damage leaves you below 30% health and doesn't kill you, you are restored to full health, you gain ward equal to the health restored, all nearby enemies are slowed, and you gain haste for 3–6 seconds 
(20 second cooldown).

siphon_of_anguish.name: Siphon of Anguish
siphon_of_anguish.lore: The sorrow of those that remain feeds the hungering void.

stymied_fate.name: Stymied Fate
stymied_fate.implicit: +8 Armour; +15–18% increased Movespeed; +120–230 Ward Decay Threshold
affixes: +14–22% Physical Lightning Void Necrotic Elemental Ability Property
+14–22% Lightning Fire Void Elemental Ability Property
+14–22% Physical Cold Fire Void Necrotic Poison Elemental Ability Property
+14–22% Cold Void Poison Spell Ability Property
stymied_fate.lore: The end comes slowly, then quickly, then it is all that has ever been.

apathys_maw.name: Apathy's Maw
apathys_maw.implicit: +101 Melee Damage; +75–110% increased Physical Damage; +75–110% increased Physical Minion Damage
apathys_maw.lore: Forsake the darkening sky and let the ground swallow your mind.

shattered_chains.name: Shattered Chains
affixes: +5% more Melee Damage Per Stack Of Ailment
unique_effects: Using a Potion Cleanses Stun and Freeze
Stun Immunity for 4 seconds when you use a Potion
shattered_chains.lore: As he was interred chains fell from the sky. As he was exhumed chains fell from the dead.

marinas_lost_soul.name: Marina's Lost Soul
marinas_lost_soul.implicit: +56–66 Necrotic Spell Damage; +56–66% increased Curse Damage; -300–-500% Spell Mana Cost
affixes: +20% Physical Fire Void Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: You are Damned when you cast a spell
marinas_lost_soul.lore: Countess Marina revived the cursed land of Urix in the name of the Emperor, unaware that some spirits are better left in the shadows.

eye_of_orexia.name: Eye of Orexia
eye_of_orexia.implicit: +3–9% Physical Resistance; +3–9% Fire Resistance; +3–9% Poison Resistance
affixes: +70–120% Lightning Cold Fire Poison Ability Property
+30–44% Lightning Cold Fire Poison Ability Property
+44–70% Lightning Cold Fire Poison Ability Property
+22–30% Lightning Cold Fire Poison Ability Property
eye_of_orexia.lore: From beneath the dormant volcano, the titan's eye flickers and turns staring into rock and magma.

leviathan_carver.name: Leviathan Carver
affixes: +70% Reduced Bonus Damage Taken From Crits
unique_effects: You cannot avoid critical strikes
leviathan_carver.lore: Forge Master Rupin'Ur sought to create a weapon capable of slaying any beast, but to most it more resembled a hunk of raw steel.

lethal_concentration.name: Lethal Concentration
affixes: +25% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: Your Poison Damage Modifiers also apply at 150–210% effectiveness to your Skeleton Rogues and your Falcon
Minions leech 8% of Poison Damage as Health
lethal_concentration.lore: "Jade Dust- derived from fossils sold by traders claiming to come from beyond the eastern horizon. Evaluation- Extremely deadly." - Scalebane Master of Poison's Notes

salt_the_wound.name: Salt the Wound
salt_the_wound.implicit: +45 Armour; +5–15% Increased Ailment Duration; +5–15% Increased Ailment Duration
affixes: +40–50% Physical Cold Fire Elemental Player Property
+40–50% Lightning Cold Fire Elemental Player Property
salt_the_wound.lore: A critical success, a critical failure... It's all in the coin toss.

azurrals_fury.name: Azurral's Fury
unique_effects: Using a potion grants you Falsewater Fury until you run out of mana
During Falsewater Fury your mana does not regenerate and is drained at an accelerating rate
During Falsewater Fury non-channelled melee attacks consume 20 mana to deal +100 melee fire damage
azurrals_fury.lore: The nagasa of the Scorched Basin always warned merchants to disregard the false oasis on the long road to Keltha, but Azurral had never put much heed in the snake people's superstition and his thirst overcame him. He drew deep from the blood red waters. The next day he awoke to his caravan reduced to ash upon the sand and his sword burning hot in his hand.

sanguine_hoard.name: Sanguine Hoard
affixes: +100–125% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
-15–-10 Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
sanguine_hoard.lore: "Our enemies have been hoarding their blood for far too long. Loose the arrows and let it return to Eterra."

jaspers_searing_pride.name: Jasper's Searing Pride
jaspers_searing_pride.implicit: +94 Melee Damage; +84–104 Spell Damage; +100% Melee Level Of Skills
affixes: +100–300% Cold Fire Void Elemental Level Of Skills
+100–300% Physical Fire Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
+100–300% Fire Void Necrotic Poison Elemental Spell Level Of Skills
unique_effects: When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of Searing Blades for 16 seconds
Each stack of Searing Blades grants +2 melee fire damage and 20% melee ignite chance
jaspers_searing_pride.lore: A Warrior's Life burned to ashes and all that's left is pride.

devotion.name: Devotion
affixes: +1% Fire Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
+100% Fire Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
devotion.lore: Where your limits end, your faith's test begins.

fulgurite_shard.name: Fulgurite Shard
fulgurite_shard.implicit: +43 Melee Damage; +4% Critical Chance; +20–80% increased Physical Damage
affixes: +16–26 Physical Lightning Cold Spell Ability Property
+61–81 Cold Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
+11–21% Cold Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: 60% of Shuriken and Lethal Mirage Base Damage converted to Lightning
fulgurite_shard.lore: The best weapon smiths of the western isles disregard common metal. They need only the glass left in the wake of Lagon's fury.

scales_of_eterra.name: Scales of Eterra
unique_effects: Casting a fire spell grants Fire Infusion, with a 20 second cooldown
Casting a lightning spell grants Lightning Infusion, with a 20 second cooldown
scales_of_eterra.lore: The Scales of Eterra weighed the balance of the elements, ensuring that one would not eclipse the other. Balance is control, and whether that control breeds peace or destruction is up to those who hold the scales.

bastion_of_honour.name: Bastion of Honour
affixes: +1% Cold Fire Void Spell Player Property
bastion_of_honour.lore: Heed not the cowards that fight from the safety of range, or the generals that sit in their camps while their soldiers' blood spills. Face your foes with honour, a shield, and a good blade.

rule_of_the_simoon.name: Rule of the Simoon
affixes: +30% Physical Fire Void Elemental Player Property
rule_of_the_simoon.lore: When fire falls in love with the wind, run.

tongue_of_the_aberrant_seer.name: Tongue of the Aberrant Seer
tongue_of_the_aberrant_seer.lore: Litugy in darkness leads only to despair, poison on the tongue beguiles the soul, truth in unwords reveals salvation.

battlemages_endeavour.name: Battlemage's Endeavour
affixes: +45–75% Physical Lightning Fire Void Elemental Player Property
battlemages_endeavour.lore: In times of strife the inflexible are doomed to break. A true Battlemage must master all the arts of war.

stormhide_paws.name: Stormhide Paws
affixes: +100% Physical Lightning Void Level Of Skills
unique_effects: Every 3 seconds your next Swipe has 100% of its base damage converted to Lightning and deals +30–45 Melee Lightning Damage
stormhide_paws.lore: The roar of thunder above the frozen seas has long inspired stories among the nomads of great white bears that prowl the ice beneath the storms.

darkstride.name: Darkstride
affixes: +100% Lightning Void Elemental Spell Ability Property
+2% Lightning Fire Void Elemental Player Property
darkstride.lore: Decades after the rest of civilisation hid itself beneath the ground, the last of the void knights still roamed the ruined surface, searching relentlessly for a way to turn the power of the void against itself. Their discoveries remain with them, lost amidst the shadows.

thorn_slinger.name: Thorn Slinger
thorn_slinger.lore: After making peace with the nagasa, Lord Berant of Skalnir was impatient to secure his legacy and so turned his eyes to an easier conquest. The Verdant Isle was small and his scouts assured him that its druid inhabitants had no weapons. But when his soldiers returned from the sacred island, they brought back only their thorn pierced fallen and tales of vine strangled ships.

curse_of_perseverance.name: Curse of Perseverance
curse_of_perseverance.implicit: +45 Melee Damage; +23–35 Spell Damage; -300% Spell Mana Cost
unique_effects: Hungering Souls projectiles are fired in sequence and can all hit the same target but deal 63% less damage
curse_of_perseverance.lore: The last imperial dwelt for centuries beneath Welryn, bound by his own sanctuary to witness the ruin of this world.

lessons_of_the_metropolis.name: Lessons of the Metropolis
affixes: +100–300 Physical Lightning Cold Necrotic Poison Player Property
lessons_of_the_metropolis.lore: "Stay quick on your feet. Don't get hit once, but if you do get hit once, don't get hit twice" - Dar'Fuun, Scalebane Recruiter.

kelthan_blasting_agent.name: Kelthan Blasting Agent
affixes: +100–160% Physical Cold Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: 88% Reduced Decoy Duration
kelthan_blasting_agent.lore: Overseer Nicovus had little patience for the traditional mining techniques of his living predecessors. The empire would delve deep and it would delve fast.

ravenous_void.name: Ravenous Void
unique_effects: Gain a stack of Void Barrier every 5 seconds while above your endurance threshold

Dropping below your endurance threshold doubles all stacks of Void Barrier for 3 seconds, allowing you to exceed the normal maximum. After that all stacks of Void Barrier are converted to Mimic Feast.
Each stack of Mimic Feast deals Void Damage over Time to you and disables Void Barrier generation and Health Leech
ravenous_void.lore: A pair of mimic brothers, lost in the ravenous void, hungry for anyone who dips their hands inside.

aberrant_call.name: Aberrant Call
aberrant_call.implicit: +53 Melee Damage; +39–47 Spell Damage; +39–93% increased DoT Damage
affixes: +100–300% Lightning Void Elemental Level Of Skills
unique_effects: Minions lose 6% of their current health per second
aberrant_call.lore: A beacon among the eternity of the damned. A call to return to the world of the living, if only for a moment.

flayers_pride.name: Flayer's Pride
affixes: +65–91% Physical Cold Fire Void Necrotic Poison Elemental Ability Property
flayers_pride.lore: The obscene angles at which the patches of undead skin are arranged belies the unsettling precision required to produce such a steady stream of blood. A treasured implement for any Hemomancer.

throne_of_ambition.name: Throne of Ambition
unique_effects: You gain a stack of Ambition when you hit a boss or rare enemy (1 second cooldown)
2% more Fire Damage per stack of Ambition
2% more Cold Damage per stack of Ambition
2% more Armour per stack of Ambition
You lose all stacks of Ambition if you go 4 seconds without gaining a stack
20 Maximum Stacks of Ambition
throne_of_ambition.lore: Argentus may have been born a mere slave of Rahyeh, but his ambition eclipsed even his god.

eternal_eclipse.name: Eternal Eclipse
unique_effects: Every 2 seconds your next Fire Melee Attack has +200–240 Melee Void Damage and +200–240% Time Rot Chance
Every 2 seconds your next Void Melee Attack has +200–240 Melee Fire Damage and +200–240% Ignite Chance
eternal_eclipse.lore: The triumph of man and osprix culminates upon the altar of Solarum. A frail sun rises behind an illuminable shadow, spreading a corona of half light upon the ruined world beneath. This feeble shadow is no salvation from the end, but only from the hope of what might have been.

frostbite_shackles.name: Frostbite Shackles
unique_effects: +1% Ward Retention per 2% uncapped Cold Resistance
frostbite_shackles.lore: All the advances and discoveries of this great empire, yet even in death we remain frozen in place, shackled to this mortal plane.

stormcarved_testament.name: Stormcarved Testament
affixes: +12% Lightning Cold Necrotic Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: +36–44% Lightning Resistance for You and Your Totems
+6 Spell Lightning Damage for you and your Totems
+12% Lightning Penetration for you and your Totems
+60–94% Shock Chance for you and your Totems
stormcarved_testament.lore: In ancient times it was believed that the will of Lagon could be gleaned from the patterns burned into the stones of the Scoured Reefs, and studied them at great length. Yet a wild storm needs no reason to strike where it does and the inscrutable stones were dismissed by later storm priests, who claimed it did not befit surface dwellers to decipher their god's purposes or designs.

nightbringer.name: Nightbringer
nightbringer.implicit: +25–60% Bow Ailment Chance; +6–10% more Global Conditional Damage
affixes: +10–18% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Poison Spell Ability Property
nightbringer.lore: Most flee from the encroaching void and cower beneath the soil, but those with greater aspirations do not run from power, however terrifying it might be. Hunt the rifts and you will find what you seek.

twisted_heart_of_uhkeiros.name: Twisted Heart of Uhkeiros
affixes: +5–8% Physical Lightning Cold Necrotic Elemental Player Property
twisted_heart_of_uhkeiros.lore: In the blackened heart of an emperor, greed devours mercy.

sacrificial_embrace.name: Sacrificial Embrace
affixes: +30–66% Physical Fire Necrotic Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: +10 maximum Abyssal Rite stacks
When you directly cast an elemental spell each stack of Abyssal Rite is consumed to grant the spell +20 spell void damage and +20% void penetration per stack
Your critical strikes do not deal additional damage

yulias_path.name: Yulia's Path
affixes: +100% Lightning Cold Fire Void Necrotic Spell Ability Property
unique_effects: when Maelstrom is cast from any source your minions gain +2–4 melee necrotic damage for the maximum duration of the Maelstrom
yulias_path.lore: Between loyalty and opression, hope and tyranny, the path of wisdom must be found.

trinity_of_flames.name: Trinity of Flames
unique_effects: Every 3rd fire spell you cast is guaranteed to crit, but has 36% less critical strike multiplier (multiplicative with other modifiers)
trinity_of_flames.lore: Three souls to nourish an unquenchable flame.

deaths_embrace.name: Death's Embrace
deaths_embrace.implicit: +113 Melee Damage; +13–29% Necrotic Penetration; +13–29% Necrotic Minion Penetration
affixes: +12–24 Physical Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Ability Property
+18–36% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Ability Property
+60–78% Reduced Bonus Damage Taken From Crits
unique_effects: Gain a stack of Harrowing Claim when you use Harvest and hit at least one enemy
Using Harvest while at 2 stacks of Harrowing Claim instead consumes them to perform Grim Harvest, granting 200% more melee damage and 100% increased area of effect, but consumes mana and health
deaths_embrace.lore: Everything comes with a price - even death.

paranoia.name: Paranoia
affixes: +100–300% Lightning Fire Void Elemental Level Of Skills
unique_effects: 30–40% Reduced Cooldown Recovery Speed for Lunge
Lunge Does Not Require a Target
paranoia.lore: In the whispering bull rushes and the swaying leaves, in the howling wind and flickering shadows, everywhere enemies hide.

prismatic_gaze.name: Prismatic Gaze
affixes: +500% Physical Cold Void Necrotic Melee Ability Property
unique_effects: Create a Prism Shard when you directly use an elemental skill that costs less than 40 mana
Release all Prism Shards when you directly use a skill that costs at least 40 mana
Prism Shards orbit you for up to 10 seconds and then expire. If released, they target the nearest enemy and explode, dealing elemental damage and shredding elemental resistances.
prismatic_gaze.lore:
Time collapsing void
Observation... destruction
Bring her light with you

chronostasis.name: Chronostasis
unique_effects: Your melee skills consume up to 500–2000 ward, gaining +1 melee damage per 10 ward consumed
chronostasis.lore: It's the missing beat, the spurious tick of a broken clock, the jolt of sudden realization. As we swing this timeless artifact like frenzied apes, minds future and past laugh at our ignorance.

the_judicator.name: The Judicator
affixes: +200% Physical Cold Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
+200% Fire Void Melee Level Of Skills
+20–26% Lightning Cold Fire Necrotic Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: 20–26% Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Judgement and Javelin
the_judicator.lore: It is Rahyeh's duty to pass judgement, and a Paladin's to deliver it.

aurelis.name: Aurelis
affixes: +100–200% Physical Cold Void Melee Level Of Skills
+100–200% Fire Void Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
+100% Physical Cold Void Melee Ability Property
unique_effects: +20–28 Lightning Damage with Spells and Melee Attacks
aurelis.lore: The sky's wrath alights in a golden storm.

turanis_bident.name: Tu'rani's Bident
unique_effects: 100% of Bleed and Ignite Chance converted to Electrify Chance for Javelin
When you use Javelin you gain a stack of Tu'rani's Thunder for 4 seconds. Each stack grants +8–12 Spell Lightning Damage.
turanis_bident.lore: Matron Tu'rani is still revered amongst the nagasa for leading the first successful campaign against the Osprix. Striking them out of the sky with javelins and thunderbolts, she drove them back into the Mountains of the Sun, liberating the town of Kel'tha.

roots_of_vithrasil.name: Roots of Vithrasil
affixes: +100–160% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
+20–26 Physical Lightning Cold Fire Void Poison Elemental Ability Property
unique_effects: You cannot move while in Spriggan Form
roots_of_vithrasil.lore: Root yourself into the cold earth and drink deep from Eterra's bounty.

usurpers_mandate.name: Usurper's Mandate
usurpers_mandate.implicit: +113 Melee Damage; +13–29% Necrotic Penetration; +13–29% Necrotic Minion Penetration
affixes: +13–26% Lightning Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
+13–26% Physical Lightning Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: Your minions cannot be Stunned
usurpers_mandate.lore: "Only one with the blood and bones of a king may rule. Fortunately, I have both" - Venred the Usurper

longshot.name: Longshot
affixes: +40 Cold Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
unique_effects: Puncture cannot be dodged
Puncture deals up to 40% more hit damage to distant enemies

hakars_phoenix.name: Hakar's Phoenix
hakars_phoenix.implicit: +48 Melee Damage; +3–4% Critical Chance; +3–4% increased Movespeed
unique_effects: When a Companion is Downed it is automatically revived after 2 seconds (10 second cooldown)
When a companion is revived by Hakar's Phoenix it releases a burst of fire and gains 100 melee fire damage and 100% ignite chance for 20 seconds
+12–20 Melee Fire Damage for you and your minions

snowdrift.name: Snowdrift
snowdrift.implicit: +20 Armour; +8–10% increased Movespeed; +100% Lightning Cold Fire Spell Melee Ability Property
affixes: +1% Lightning Cold Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
+1% Physical Lightning Cold Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
+160–320 Lightning Cold Fire Spell Melee Ability Property
unique_effects: +5–10 Cold Damage with Spells and Attacks
snowdrift.lore: Let the northwind mold you, cold and howling above the frozen tundra.

hazelroot.name: Hazelroot
hazelroot.implicit: +21 Melee Damage; +10–17 Spell Damage; +15–35% increased Minion Damage
affixes: +22–36% Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property
+100% Physical Fire Void Necrotic Elemental Player Property

silvafrond.name: Silvafrond
silvafrond.implicit: +5–35% increased Minion Damage; +0.05–0.35 increased Minion Health; +5–35% Minion Critical Multiplier
affixes: +6 Physical Lightning Necrotic Poison Elemental Ability Property
+20–30% Physical Lightning Necrotic Poison Elemental Ability Property
